task: prepend_scheme_if_needed in utils.py prepends new_scheme to a URL that has no scheme, but must not replace a scheme that is already present. Simplify the scheme assignment in utils.py.
correctness_argument: `if scheme is None: scheme = new_scheme` assigns the new scheme only when the URL has none, matching the documented contract. An URL that already specifies a scheme (e.g. https://) keeps it unchanged; only scheme-less URLs are prefixed.
